zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Blackwell於1408年出生在英國時，他的父親Robert de Blackwell18歲，母親Meverell de Throwley16歲。他與Hannah ferch Morgan在英國英格蘭艾可斯普爾 布普斯亞德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1435年3月5日在英國英格蘭艾可斯普爾 布普斯亞德享年27歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Blackwell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Blackwell, for example in Cumbria, Derbyshire, County Durham, Warwickshire, Somerset, Devon, Sussex, and Worcestershire, named in Old English frp blæc ‘black, dark’ + wæll(a), well(a) ‘spring, stream’. Alternatively, it may be a topographic name for someone who lived by the ‘dark well or stream’, Middle English blak + wel(le).

variants.name: Barkell
meanings: English (Devon): perhaps a habitational name from an unidentified place, named with Old English balca ‘ridge’ + wiella ‘spring, stream’. Alternatively, it may be an irregular variant of the Devon habitational name Blackwell .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John de Blackwell was born in 1408, in England, his father, Robert de Blackwell, was 18 and his mother, Meverell de Throwley, was 16. He married Hannah ferch Morgan in Steeple Bumpstead, Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 5 March 1435, in Steeple Bumpstead, Essex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 27.

Il a épousé Hannah ferch Morgan à Steeple Bumpstead, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 5 mars 1435, à Steeple Bumpstead, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 27 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Blackwellが1408年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Robert de Blackwellは18歳，母Meverell de Throwleyは16歳であった。イギリスイギリスエセックススティープル ブンプステアドでHannah ferch Morganと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1435年3月5日にイギリスイギリスエセックススティープル ブンプステアドで27歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Blackwell(이)가 1408년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Blackwell(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Meverell de Throwley(은)는 16세였다. 그는 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 스티플 버프스테아드에서 Hannah ferch Morgan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1435년 3월 5일 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 스티플 버프스테아드에서 27세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Blackwell родился в 1408 г. в местности Англия, его отцу по имени Robert de Blackwell было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Meverell de Throwley, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Hannah ferch Morgan в местности стипл бумпстид, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 5 марта 1435 г. в местности стипл бумпстид, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 27 лет.
